name: W_CIDeconvolve
description: 3D Richardson-Lucy deconvolution for widefield and confocal microscopy images with multiple algorithm backends (sdeconv, pycudadecon, deconwolf, DeconvolutionLab2, redlionfish, scikit-image). Supports GPU acceleration via CUDA and OpenCL.

inputs.name: RL iterations
inputs.description: Number of Richardson-Lucy iterations to run

inputs.name: Tile blocks
inputs.description: Block tiling mode. 'auto': calculate minimum blocks so each tile fits in memory. 0 or 1: no tiling. >1: explicit block count.

inputs.name: Compute device
inputs.description: Force compute device for sdeconv/deconwolf/redlionfish backends. 'auto' uses CUDA if available, otherwise CPU.

inputs.name: Benchmark mode
inputs.description: If true, centre-crop the image to tile-size limits and only save montage images.

inputs.name: Z-projection
inputs.description: Output a 2D Z-projection instead of the full 3D stack. 'mip': maximum intensity projection, 'sum': sum projection (converted to float32 if needed), 'none': keep full 3D stack. Ignored for 2D input images.

inputs.name: Save PSF
inputs.description: If true, save PSF montage PNG (XY and XZ MIP) in the output folder.
